nasb.text: These are the things which you should do: speak the truth to one another; judge with truth and judgment for peace in your gates.

esv.text: These are the things that you shall do: Speak the truth to one another; render in your gates judgments that are true and make for peace;

cnv.text: 你們應當行這些事：你們各人要與鄰舍說真話，在你們的城門口要憑著誠實施行帶來和平的審判。

ccb.text: 你们所当做的是彼此说真话，在城门口秉公断案，使人和睦。
